data.body:
I feel like a lot of the hate that the PC ports of the early 2000s GTA trilogy gets comes from people trying to run them on modern systems.

These 20+ year old games were not designed for modern CPU and GPUs. They weren't designed to run at 60 FPS and will absolutely break without the frame limiter.
